# Alice Smith

## Context
- Lead engineer on the [[Widget Theory]] project
- Collaborates with [[Bob Jones]] on research
- Proposed the [[Acme Project]] as a way to test [[Gadget Pattern]] in production

## Notes
Alice presented at the 2025 conference about emergent patterns in distributed systems.
She argued that [[Widget Theory]] provides a better framework than traditional approaches.
